ItemData.Name: Thao Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay bang co thuong, che tac tho so. "

ItemData.Name: Bo Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay bang vai thuong trong nhan gian thuong dung.

ItemData.Name: Thien tang bo Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay vai day, mau xam tro. "

ItemData.Name: Cat Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay duoc tinh che tu co Cat dang.

ItemData.Name: Thuong Cat Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Dung loai Cat Dang lau nam, tinh deo cuc cao. "

ItemData.Name: Bach Nien Thuong Cat Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay co duoc dung nhieu o vung Van Nam.

ItemData.Name: Tri Vi Tong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay cuc pham da co danh tieng hon tram nam.

ItemData.Name: Giao Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay duoc lam tu long chim tri.

ItemData.Name: Phong Vi Tong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay duoc lam tu to lua cuc hiem, chi co o phuong Nam. "

ItemData.Name: Cuu Tiet Xuong Vi Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Dung loai co Xuong Bo o co huong cua Khuat Nguyen ket thanh, nhe ma chac chan"

ItemData.Name: Nguu Bi ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay lam bang da bo thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Tat Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay lam tu loai co dac biet.

ItemData.Name: O Bi Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay da bo nhung da qua tinh che.

ItemData.Name: Dang Mong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay thuong dang tinh che tu co Dang Mong.

ItemData.Name: Phi La Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay thuong dang tinh che tu co Dang Mong va to dieu.

ItemData.Name: Luc Thuy Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Giay lam tu to truc.

ItemData.Name: Ho Bi Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay may tu da ho trang hiem thay.

ItemData.Name: Te Bi Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay thuong dang, tinh che tu lua va da te giac. "

ItemData.Name: Long Lan Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Tuy goi la Long Lan Ngoa, thuc te duoc lam tu da ca sau."

ItemData.Name: Thien Tam Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Dung Loai to Thien Tam thuong dang may thanh, tinh deo cuc cao"

ItemData.Name: Tu Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "La loai hai thong thuong, o dau cung thay. "

ItemData.Name: Lang To Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: La loai giay dung Loai to thuong dang may thanh.

ItemData.Name: Gam hai
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay cua nu gioi, duoc may tu gam thuong hang. "

ItemData.Name: Uyen Uong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay co theu hinh hoa buom.

ItemData.Name: Toan Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Dung loai to danh tieng che thanh, do deo cuc cao. "

ItemData.Name: Lam Ngoc hai
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay tu to thuong dang, mau sac trang xanh rat dep mat. "

ItemData.Name: Lien Phong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giay tu to thuong dang, danh cho nu gioi. "

ItemData.Name: Pham Hong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: La loai giay thuong dung trong nha Phat.

ItemData.Name: Bach Chu ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay duoc may tu lua dieu va to Thien Tam.

ItemData.Name: Kim Lu hai
ItemData.Descript: Dung to Thien Tam va cac soi vang mong may thanh.

ItemData.Name: Loc Bi ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay duoc may tuda Nai trang.

ItemData.Name: Ky hai
ItemData.Descript: Dung nhung loai thuc vat thuong dang may thanh.

ItemData.Name: Ngan Doan ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay may tu cac thu lua thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Phu Dung ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Dung nhung loai lua thuong dang may thanh.

ItemData.Name: Hoa Tuong Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay may tu gam do.

ItemData.Name: Muc Van ngoa
ItemData.Descript: May tu vo cay va cac loai to thuong dang.

ItemData.Name: Xuong Hoan ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai giay bi truyen duoc lam tu lua to hoan.

ItemData.Name: Tuyet Doanh ngoa
ItemData.Descript: Duoc lam tu to Thien Tam va to Bach Ngan.

ItemData.Name: Sinh Sa ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Dung cac loai to cuc nhe che thanh, do deo rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Phi Phung Ngoa
ItemData.Descript: "Theo truyen thuyet, loai giay nay duoc may tu long chim Phung Hoang, co the coi may, di tren mat nuoc. "
